title: cichorium intybus subsp. intybus
intro: Cichorium intybus subsp. intybus, commonly known as the wild or bitter chicory, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in health benefits, such as supporting digestive health, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural diuretic. Cichorium intybus subsp. intybus can be consumed as a herbal preparation, including dried root, leaves, and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional medicine.
